name: Cushion Cover - Violet Sunset Diamond Weave
description: Handwoven pillow cover with bold violet side panels, sunset orange accents, and a centered geometric diamond motif.

name: Cushion Cover - Lime Black Graphic Frame
description: Graphic handwoven pillow cover in lime green and black with layered geometric framing and a central diamond detail.

name: Cushion Cover - Monochrome Striped Band
description: Monochrome handwoven design featuring black and ivory stripes with three horizontal patterned bands for a modern look.

name: Cushion Cover - High Contrast Diamond Grid
description: High-contrast black and white pillow cover with repeating diamond and vertical geometric motifs in a clean structured layout.

name: Cushion Cover - Classic Diamond Stripe
description: Classic black and white woven pillow cover with striped borders and vertical rows of small diamond motifs in the center panel.

name: Cushion Cover - Coral Pink Diamond Lines
description: Vibrant handwoven pillow cover in magenta, pink, and coral tones with repeating diamond accents over fine horizontal lines.

name: Cushion Cover - Neon Geo Square
description: Contemporary geometric pillow cover in neon lime, yellow, and deep teal with a bold centered square motif.

name: Cushion Cover - Mustard Amber Frame
description: Warm mustard and amber woven pillow cover with a framed central diamond and balanced border detailing.

name: Cushion Cover - Deep Green Diamond Stripe
description: Deep green and black striped pillow cover with yellow highlights and repeating small diamond motifs in a linear composition.

name: Cushion Cover - Cobalt Multi Diamond
description: Handwoven pillow cover in cobalt blue, green, and yellow with side panels and a centered multi-diamond motif.

name: Cushion Cover - Beige Black Diamond Lines
description: Elegant black and beige woven pillow cover with fine stripes and evenly spaced geometric diamond motifs.

name: Cushion Cover - Amber Vertical Diamonds
description: Rich orange and amber handwoven pillow cover with a dark center field and vertically arranged diamond accents.

name: Cushion Cover - Teal Lime Triangle
description: Teal and lime geometric pillow cover with a striking triangular center composition and subtle border patterning.

name: Cushion Cover - Bold Blue Diamond Cluster
description: Bold blue, green, and yellow woven pillow cover featuring structured side panels and a centered diamond cluster motif.

name: Cushion Cover - Minimal Cream Geo Panel
description: Minimalist cream and black handwoven pillow cover with a centered geometric panel and understated woven texture.

name: Cushion Cover - Earth Tone Triangle Weave
description: Earth-tone woven pillow cover in brown, cream, and black with mirrored triangular motifs and balanced border framing.

name: Wall Hanger - Midnight Diamond Horizon
description: Handwoven wall hanger with layered blue and yellow-green bands, a centered diamond medallion, and stepped geometric side panels over a dark field.

name: Wall Hanger - Prism Diamond Frame
description: Bold multicolor wall hanger with a radiant diamond center, framed side pillars, and saturated yellow-green, magenta, and amber striping.

name: Wall Hanger - Ivory Heritage Panel
description: Classic black and ivory wall hanger with framed motif blocks, fine horizontal striping, and balanced ornamental panels across the center.

name: Wall Hanger - Sunset Labyrinth Grid
description: Handwoven wall hanger in warm magenta, amber, and green tones with nested rectangular framing and a glowing labyrinth-style center.

name: Wall Hanger - Festival Stripe Diamond
description: Vibrant striped wall hanger with repeating side motifs, a central diamond band, and a lively mix of green, blue, and yellow accents.

name: Wall Hanger - Orchard Medallion Bands
description: Graphic wall hanger with bright yellow-green panels, red framed motifs, and a central medallion band set against a deep black weave.

name: Wall Hanger - Ocean Pulse Geometry
description: Cool-toned wall hanger with blue and teal gradients, framed geometric blocks, and a mirrored central motif with subtle purple accents.

name: Wall Hanger - Mosaic Crossroads
description: Handwoven wall hanger with layered square motifs, side medallions, and a bright interplay of green, purple, and orange across the weave.

name: Wall Hanger - Ember Step Mosaic
description: Richly patterned wall hanger with stepped geometric blocks, orange and plum bands, and small gold accents arranged in a rhythmic grid.

name: Wall Hanger - Earth line Arrow Tapestry
description: Earth-tone wall hanger featuring boxed motifs, vertical stripe dividers, and a bold arrow composition in brown, beige, and black.

name: Wall Hanger - Solar Loom Diamond
description: Radiant wall hanger with blue side blocks, a warm orange center field, and a diamond chain motif framed by yellow-green highlights.

name: Wall Hanger - Electric Frame Tapestry
description: Handwoven wall hanger with vivid blue borders, a concentric square center, and layered yellow-green and purple striping across the panel.

name: Wall Hanger - Aurora Pathway Weave
description: Color-rich wall hanger with mirrored square motifs, sunset orange bands, and purple framing that creates a bold pathway-like composition.

name: Wall Hanger - Monochrome Heritage Frame
description: Traditional black and white wall hanger with a framed center panel, small diamond motifs, and ornamental side columns in crisp contrast.

name: Wall Hanger - Blue Current Diamond
description: Contemporary wall hanger with flowing blue bands, yellow-green highlights, and a centered diamond motif framed by tall linear side panels.
